title: 04.06.26 Weekly Reports Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests
resolved_text:
Memorandum
DATE: April 6, 2026
TO: Mayor and City Council
THROUGH: Jackie Bryant, City Manager
FROM: Esha Singh, Management Assistant
DEPT: City Manager's Office
SUBJECT: 04.06.26 Weekly Reports: Public Records Request, Media Requests, and Code Enforcement Services Requests

This memorandum includes weekly reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for March 27, 2026 through April 2, 2026.
The following reports are attached:
• Public records requests received by the City Clerk's Office (attachment A)
• Weekly media requests received by Strategic Communications (attachment B)
• Weekly code enforcement service requests received by Code Enforcement (attachment C)

fields.subcategory: Public Records Requests, Media Requests, Code Enforcement Service Requests
fields.tldr: This memo transmits weekly activity reports from the City Clerk's Office, Strategic Communications, and Code Enforcement to the Mayor and City Council for the period of March 27 through April 2, 2026. The bulk of the attached data consists of public records requests logged by the City Clerk's Office, covering police reports, body-worn camera video, building records, 911 logs, fire prevention records, and code enforcement inquiries. The memo was prepared by Management Assistant Esha Singh and routed through City Manager Jackie Bryant. No policy decisions or budget items are presented; the memo is purely informational.
fields.key_stats: Partial weekly report data shown covers at least 63 public records requests logged between March 27–28, 2026, spanning Police Department Records, General Public Records, and Fire Department Records categories.
fields.action_items: Mayor and City Council to review attached weekly reports: (A) Public records requests from City Clerk's Office, (B) Media requests from Strategic Communications, (C) Code enforcement service requests from Code Enforcement.
